signatureMove.name: Torrent of Power
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Deal 2 Magical Dmg to all models within 2" that did not participate in this round of melee. This does not count as Melee Dmg. Then all models within 2" are moved 2" directly away.

abilities.name: Unholy Strength
abilities.description: Increase all Melee Dmg dealt by +3. Melee Dmg caused by this character counts as Magical instead of the listed Dmg type.

abilities.name: A Busy Tyrant
abilities.description: This character may not enter play via Reanimate.

abilities.name: Fleeting Presence
abilities.description: This action may be used whilst this model is active and may not be removed from this card by any abilities. This model suffers 2 Wds. Then, if this character wasn't slain, it may immediately take an action available to it costing (1) or (2) energy without spending energy.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Target suffers X+1 Magical Dmg or X+2 Magical Dmg if the target is not at full health.
This character suffers an amount of Wds equal to the number of Wds it has currently suffered.
